subject: feat(theme): add theme combo picker and Uniwind switching hook
body:
Create useTheme hook that bridges Uniwind.setTheme() with persisted
user preferences (combo + dark mode). Supports 4 theme combos:
Teal (cupcake/aqua), Nature (emerald/forest), Nordic (nord/abyss),
Bold (cupcake/dracula).

Add theme combo picker to BurgerMenu — horizontal row of swatches
for combo selection, plus the existing dark/light toggle. During
migration, both old (useThemeMode) and new (useTheme) systems are
called on toggle to keep them in sync.

Tags: theme, daisyui, uniwind, ui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: daisyui-theme-migration
Semver: minor
